mappings.rationaleAI: Bolivar covers the liberation campaigns across Venezuela, Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, and Bolivia, Gran Colombia, and his disillusionment as the republic fragmented, directly matching A.2 on the South American War of Independence and the founding of successor states in D and E.

The Haitian Revolution (1791-1804) covers Toussaint Louverture's successful slave revolt and Haiti's independence, directly matching A.1.b on Toussaint-Louverture's revolt and C.2.a on Haiti's independence and subsequent civil war.

The Mexican Revolution (1910-1920) covers the fall of Diaz, competing factions (Madero, Zapata, Villa, Carranza), and the 1917 Constitution, directly matching B.3.b on Madero's challenge to Diaz and B.4 on the Revolutionary period.
The Mexican-American War (1846-48) covers Santa Anna, the war with the US over Texas, New Mexico, and California, directly matching B.1.b on Santa Anna and the war with the US.
